methods.description: Re-examination of 26 samples from a micropalaeontological perspective to cross-check benthic foraminiferal numbers and reconstruct palaeodepth and sea-level changes.

steps.description: A total of 26 samples (391-1 to 391-26) were re-examined from the micropalaeontological point of view.
Based on the faunal counts, benthic foraminiferal numbers (BFN; number of specimens per gram dry sediment) were re-calculated.
steps.searchable_summary: recalculate benthic foraminiferal numbers from faunal counts

steps.description: Species diversity of benthic foraminifera was estimated by the Fisher α index (α), using the program 'PAST' of Hammer et al. (2001).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Fisher α index for species diversity using PAST software

steps.description: The percentage of planktonic species in the total foraminiferal association (%P) calculated as 100*P/(P+B) and retained from Drinia et al. (2007).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate percentage of planktonic species in foraminiferal association
